description: An adapter is loaded or merged onto a different base revision or tokenizer than it was trained on.
body: Failure mode: a LoRA adapter trained on one base revision and tokenizer is loaded onto a newer base or a re-tokenized model, so the low-rank updates misalign with the frozen weights and outputs degrade subtly. Detection signals: output quality below the training-time reference with no code change, and adapter metadata whose base id/revision or tokenizer hash does not match the serving model. Do not assume close revisions are interchangeable. Safer fallback: record the exact base revision and tokenizer hash in adapter metadata, validate compatibility before any load or merge, and run a parity check against a reference prompt set, denying the merge on mismatch.
